title: Sweaty Sword
description: A texturepack with a sweaty minecraft sword
body:
If you are tired of the classic minecraft sword then this pack is for you!
the diamond sword is now a lot more better looking.
it is shorter and has a nicer color to it!

pack contains:
* a more tryhard looking diamond sword


```
THIS PACK ONLY AFFECTS THE MINECRAFT_DIAMOND_SWORD
```
